Please note that the adjustments to the following combat parts are still in the final testing stage. We may make further adjustments based on your feedback and test results. Please refer to the official announcement for the final content.

【Awakening the body and spirit, strengthening the plasticity of the body】
Ramona, Lotan, Ogier, Dor, Alice, and Erica will receive unique spiritual plastic adaptability enhancements to help these early characters play a greater role in the Star Chapter.

【Strengthening of the whole domain Key Token】
The upper limit of the silver key energy in all realms will be increased to be consistent with the pure Chaos, and a second special key order can be used in each round.This can make all realms more flexible in the planning and use of silver key energy.The unique advantage of pure chaos will be adjusted to “the second special key order can be triggered twice”, making its processing of silver key energy more important.

【Strengthening of the tentacles of the deep sea Realm】
New effect of tidal wave posture: If you are in a tidal wave posture at the end of the round, a tentacle will be generated at the beginning of the next round.In addition, when the upper limit of the tentacles is reached, the upper limit of the tentacles can be increased by continuing to generate the tentacles in any way, but the number of tentacles required to be generated will gradually increase.This adjustment will further distinguish the functions of the three gestures of the deep sea, and also make the linkage team of touch generation and command more potential.

【The difficulty of forgetting is reduced】
We will continue to lower the difficulty of the normal mode of the eighth and final chapters of Oblivion, to help the secret keeper to pass the customs smoothly without having to rely entirely on a specific strong combination.In the future, the challenging content of the gameplay will mainly focus on the difficult mode and the provision of disaster relief restricted areas.

【The difficulty of the Star Chapter is reduced】
The main investigation of the Star chapter will eliminate the 15-round limit, so that levels that were previously difficult to clear can also be completed through the emergency spirit body.In addition, the natural trigger damage of Star counterattack and poisoning will increase with the number of awakens of the current team, up to 200%.Even if the team does not have much ability to increase poisoning and counterattack, these two effects can perform better.

【Extra points for the restricted area of financial disasters】
An additional team challenge opportunity will be added to each wave in the financial disaster restricted area, and 5 points will be awarded, with a maximum of 25 points per game.This creates more possibilities for high scores for everyone under the premise that the difficulty and reward remain the same.The adjustment will not be implemented directly with the 1.5 anniversary version. Hi Luma, my 2c on dolphin/whaling in this game. I think you are right that this game does want dupes (normally e1 or e2) for usage. But I do think that this is due to difficulty of the content. It is a hard balance for me since I don't really want too easy of a game where everyone becomes easily viable. I think one big difference with morimens is that balance changes are frequent.

Also, if you are a spender, I really think that judging pulls by hard pity needed is misguided. That to me is more relevant to F2P players since they fall victim to volatility whereas if you pull with more volume, you can rely more on the average. So saying you need 140 pulls(for 1 copy of rate up) for R1999 and 360(for E3) for Morimens is kinda strange to me. Whereas I would look at it more like average of ~83 pulls/copy for R1999 and ~40 pulls/copy(~30 for wheel) for morimens meaning you need ~280 pulls for E3 char/E3 wheel. 

Going for E3 for char/wheels isn't really too crazy if you buy 1 pack a month.

Pull income in morimens including the spend($100 a month):

~50 pulls f2p sources not including chapter completion
31 pulls from monthly pack
15 pulls from BP
120 pulls from 2 hr fomo (assuming 2x per week).
then from preorders and ch completion packs to fill the gap.

Going for +4 is more expensive for sure as you would likely need to buy the 5000 pack(1x or sometimes 2x) when you reach milestones

Hi Luma, my 2c on dolphin/whaling in this game. I think you are right that this game does want dupes (normally e1 or e2) for usage. But I do think that this is due to difficulty of the content. It is a hard balance for me since I don't really want too easy of a game where everyone becomes easily viable. I think one big difference with morimens is that balance changes are frequent.

Also, if you are a spender, I really think that judging pulls by hard pity needed is misguided. That to me is more relevant to F2P players since they fall victim to volatility whereas if you pull with more volume, you can rely more on the average. So saying you need 140 pulls(for 1 copy of rate up) for R1999 and 360(for E3) for Morimens is kinda strange to me. Whereas I would look at it more like average of ~83 pulls/copy for R1999 and ~40 pulls/copy(~30 for wheel) for morimens meaning you need ~280 pulls for E3 char/E3 wheel. 

Going for E3 for char/wheels isn't really too crazy if you buy 1 pack a month.

Pull income in morimens including the spend($100 a month):

~50 pulls f2p sources not including chapter completion
31 pulls from monthly pack
15 pulls from BP
120 pulls from 2 hr fomo (assuming 2x per week).
then from preorders and ch completion packs to fill the gap.

Going for +4 is more expensive for sure as you would likely need to buy the 5000 pack(1x or sometimes 2x) when you reach milestones
